about_descripcion: Carlos brings precision to every cut — whether you come to the shop or he comes to you. Based at Legends Barbershop in Murrieta, he's built a reputation on clean lines, consistent fades, and zero excuses for a bad haircut.
principio_1_desc: Every fade, every line — executed with the same discipline. No shortcuts.
principio_2_desc: Available at Legends or direct to your home. Same quality, wherever you are.
principio_3_desc: Real advice on what works for your face. We don't just cut — we consult.

servicios.desc: Precision cut, consultation, and styling tailored to your face shape.
Full haircut plus beard shaping and line up. The complete package.
Clean beard shaping and crisp line up with a fresh finish.
Classic hot towel shave paired with a full haircut. The premium experience.
Carlos comes to you. Same service, your space. [PENDIENTE — confirmar precio con Carlos]

servicios_extra: Kid's Cut $30 · Buzz Cut $30 · Head Line Up $25 · Hot Towel Shave $40 · Active Military $30 · Seniors $30 · Cut & Design (varies)
